causal_question: What is the average causal effect, at the alignment threshold, of an MLA being from the MP's party on per-project MPLADS expenditure for projects proposed within two years after a state election?
vague_question: How much more money does an MP spend on a local project when the area's state legislator is from the same party, for projects proposed soon after state elections? This focuses on places right at the margin between aligned and not aligned.
